## Description

<!-- Describe the changes and the motivation behind them -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check the relevant box -->

- [ ] 🆕 `feat` - New feature
- [ ] 🐛 `fix` - Bug fix
- [ ] ♻️  `refactor` - Code refactoring
- [ ] 📝 `docs` - Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 `test` - Test changes
- [ ] 🔧 `chore` - Maintenance / config
- [ ] 🚀 `ci` - CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] 📦 `build` - Build system / dependencies

## Scope

<!-- Affected package(s): app, flags, api, file, text, cmd, docker, ci, deps -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `go test ./tests/... -v`
- [ ] Builds successfully: `go build ./cmd`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new or changed functionality
- [ ] `go mod tidy` run if dependencies changed
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if any)
